waypoints.title: Waypoints
nearby.title: 📍 Nearby
nearby.map_filters_title_on: Nearby follows the categories currently visible on the map
nearby.map_filters_title_off: Nearby shows all categories, ignoring map category visibility
nearby.stay_in_list_title_on: Focus stays in the current list after marking/unmarking
nearby.stay_in_list_title_off: Focus follows the item to the other list after marking/unmarking
settings.title: Settings
settings.option_restore_last_position_de: Returns to the location and zoom from your last visit
settings.option_auto_hide_found_desc: Automatically disables "Found Locations" when the map opens
settings.slider_icon_scale_desc: Scales location markers while keeping automatic zoom-based sizing.
settings.option_round_window_desc: Applies an elliptical mask to the window
settings.option_follow_game_window_desc: Moves the overlay automatically when the game window is moved
settings.option_always_show_title_bar_de: Keeps the title bar always visible instead of showing only on mouse hover (square mode only)
settings.slider_browser_zoom_desc: Zoom level of the map page. Applied immediately on save.
settings.hotkey_restart_tooltip: Restart overlay for the new hotkey to take effect
settings.note_toggle_overlay: Shows or hides the overlay window. Keyboard change requires restart.
settings.note_focus_toggle: Toggles focus between Crimson Desert and the overlay map. Restart required.
settings.note_hotkey_restart: Restart required to apply hotkey change.
settings.note_controller_combo: Hold button combo on controller, then release. Restart required.
settings.note_realtime_transport: Restart overlay or reload the map to apply transport changes.
settings.option_teleport_enabled_desc: When disabled, the physics delta hook (hook_e) and invulnerability hook (hook_c) are not injected into the game. Useful to avoid conflicts with other mods.
settings.option_shared_memory_desc: Reads player entity base from Freedom Flyer shared memory instead of installing an entity hook (hook_a). Reduces hook conflicts when using both mods together. Disable if not using Freedom Flyer and experiencing entity detection issues.
settings.slider_center_tp_y_desc: Absolute Y used when teleporting to the center of the screen
settings.option_nearby_controls_enabled_: Shift+N or LB+Down opens the nearby popup. In the popup: Up/Down, W/S, or D-pad moves, Enter, Space, or A toggles found, Esc or B closes.
settings.option_nearby_respect_map_visib: When enabled, the nearby popup only shows locations from categories currently visible on the MapGenie map.
settings.help_nearby_controls: LB+Down / Shift+N open. Up/Down, W/S, D-pad navigate. Enter/Space/A toggles. Esc/B closes.
settings.option_rotate_with_player_desc: The map rotates to always show the player's forward direction at the top
settings.option_rotate_with_camera_desc: The map rotates using the camera heading received via WebSocket
settings.tooltip_heading_source:
auto: uses forward vector when available, falls back to delta
entity: uses entity+0x80/0x88 only (works while standing still)
delta: always computes from position difference
settings.option_disable_gpu_vsync_desc: Fixes FPS cap when using the overlay on a secondary monitor with a different refresh rate. Requires restart.
settings.help_waypoints_controls: In popup: D-pad Up/Down navigate, A selects/teleports, Y deletes, B closes.
login.title: Login required
login.message:
You need to log in
to access the map.
mode.title: CD Companion - Mode
mode.description:
Full - map overlay with all features
Server Only - no window, only WebSocket + hotkeys (saves ~300 MB RAM)
